name: Lancashire (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: the gold of the historic Lancastrian arms
the leaves and stem of the rose

description: A gold field with a single red rose (the Red Rose of Lancaster) at the centre.
history: Registered with the Flag Institute on 27 November 2008; the Red Rose of Lancaster on gold echoes the medieval livery of the House of Lancaster.

features.symbolism: the heraldic badge of the House of Lancaster, in use since the 14th century
